content.text: The previous stage's background monitors were interrupted by the session transition. Let me check the current cluster state before starting the version upgrade.

input.command:
kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -o wide
echo "--- sts image ---"
kubectl -n cockroachdb get sts crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}'; echo
echo "--- sts command ---"
kubectl -n cockroachdb get sts crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].command}'; echo
echo "--- sts status ---"
kubectl -n cockroachdb get sts crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.status}'; echo
echo "--- partition ---"
kubectl -n cockroachdb get sts crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.updateStrategy.rollingUpdate.partition}'; echo

content.text: The cluster is fully healthy from the previous stage (all 3 pods 1/1, same revision, no pending rollout). Now I'll perform a controlled rolling upgrade to v24.1.1, one pod at a time (highest ordinal first) using the `partition` field, verifying cluster health between each step.

content.text: `ranges_underreplicated` is still at 36 (cluster still catching up from the earlier recovery) even though nodes are live. I should wait for that to reach 0 before starting the upgrade, to avoid risking availability.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  val=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- /bin/bash -c "curl -s http://localhost:8080/_status/vars | grep -E '^ranges_underreplicated' | awk '{print \$2}'")
  echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) ranges_underreplicated=$val"
  if [ "$val" = "0" ]; then echo "STABLE"; break; fi
  sleep 5
done

content.text: Cluster is stable (`ranges_underreplicated=0`). Now I'll begin the controlled rolling upgrade, starting with the highest-ordinal pod (crdb-cluster-2) by setting the partition first.

input.command:
kubectl -n cockroachdb patch statefulset crdb-cluster --type='json' -p='[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/updateStrategy/rollingUpdate/partition","value":2}]'
kubectl -n cockroachdb patch statefulset crdb-cluster --type='json' -p='[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image","value":"cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.1"}]'
echo "--- partition ---"
kubectl -n cockroachdb get sts crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.updateStrategy.rollingUpdate.partition}'; echo
echo "--- pods ---"
kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.name}: {.spec.containers[0].image}{"\n"}{end}'

description:

content.text: Partition is set to 2, and the image is updated — only crdb-cluster-2 (ordinal ≥ 2) should be recreated. Let's watch it roll.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  out=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -o wide | tail -n +1)
  echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S)"
  echo "$out"
  ready=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pod crdb-cluster-2 -o jsonpath='{.status.containerStatuses[0].ready}' 2>/dev/null)
  img=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pod crdb-cluster-2 -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[0].image}' 2>/dev/null)
  if [ "$ready" = "true" ] && [ "$img" = "cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.1" ]; then
    echo "crdb-cluster-2 upgraded and ready"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done

content.text: All nodes live and available, node 3 now on v24.1.1. Let's wait for `ranges_underreplicated` to settle to 0 before proceeding to pod-1.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  val=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- /bin/bash -c "curl -s http://localhost:8080/_status/vars | grep -E '^ranges_underreplicated' | awk '{print \$2}'")
  echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) ranges_underreplicated=$val"
  if [ "$val" = "0" ]; then echo "STABLE"; break; fi
  sleep 5
done

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 12); do
  val=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- /bin/bash -c "curl -s http://localhost:8080/_status/vars | grep -E '^ranges_underreplicated' | awk '{print \$2}'")

  if [ "$val" = "0" ]; then echo "STABLE"; break; fi
  sleep 5
done

content.text: Cluster is stable. Now proceeding to upgrade crdb-cluster-1 by lowering the partition to 1.

input.command:
kubectl -n cockroachdb patch statefulset crdb-cluster --type='json' -p='[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/updateStrategy/rollingUpdate/partition","value":1}]'
kubectl -n cockroachdb get sts crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.updateStrategy.rollingUpdate.partition}'; echo

for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  ready=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pod crdb-cluster-1 -o jsonpath='{.status.containerStatuses[0].ready}' 2>/dev/null)
  img=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pod crdb-cluster-1 -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[0].image}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) ready=$ready img=$img"
  if [ "$ready" = "true" ] && [ "$img" = "cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.1" ]; then
    echo "crdb-cluster-1 upgraded and ready"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done

description:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  ready=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pod crdb-cluster-1 -o jsonpath='{.status.containerStatuses[0].ready}' 2>/dev/null)

done

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  val=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- /bin/bash -c "curl -s http://localhost:8080/_status/vars | grep -E '^ranges_underreplicated' | awk '{print \$2}'")
  echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) ranges_underreplicated=$val"
  if [ "$val" = "0" ]; then echo "STABLE"; break; fi
  sleep 5
done

content.text: Cluster stable at 0 underreplicated ranges. Now proceeding to the final pod, crdb-cluster-0, by setting partition to 0.

input.command:
kubectl -n cockroachdb patch statefulset crdb-cluster --type='json' -p='[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/updateStrategy/rollingUpdate/partition","value":0}]'
kubectl -n cockroachdb get sts crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.updateStrategy.rollingUpdate.partition}'; echo

for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  ready=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pod crdb-cluster-0 -o jsonpath='{.status.containerStatuses[0].ready}' 2>/dev/null)
  img=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pod crdb-cluster-0 -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[0].image}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) ready=$ready img=$img"
  if [ "$ready" = "true" ] && [ "$img" = "cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.1" ]; then
    echo "crdb-cluster-0 upgraded and ready"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
